name: Heatmap: ovarian SL genes
what_it_solves: Heatmap visualising SL gene profile across the ovarian cohort.
how_it_solves: Rendered from DepMap + TCGA-OV data; complements the A3/A7 analyses in the MBD4/ATR bundle.
why_it_exists: Fast-look visualisation for the ovarian seed cancer — used in slide decks and manuscript figures.
